business.name: Riverside Roastery
business.tagline: Small-batch coffee, house-made pastries, and a patio steps from the water.
business.description: Independent cafe focused on ethically sourced beans, seasonal menus, and a calm place to work or catch up with friends.

hero.headline: Coffee roasted here. Served with care.
hero.subheadline: Espresso, pour-over, and brunch favorites overlooking the inlet.

services.name: Espresso bar
services.description: Classic drinks, seasonal signatures, and oat or dairy milk options.

services.name: Brunch
services.description: Avocado toast, breakfast sandwiches, and weekend specials until 2pm.

services.name: Beans to go
services.description: Whole-bean retail bags from our weekly roast schedule.

about.headline: Why we roast in-house
about.body: We source direct-trade lots, roast in small batches, and dial recipes daily so every cup tastes intentional—not generic.

testimonials.author: Priya N.
testimonials.quote: Best cortado in the neighborhood. Staff remembers my order.

testimonials.author: Marcus T.
testimonials.quote: Quiet enough to work, great natural light, solid Wi‑Fi.

seo.title: Riverside Roastery | Coffee & Brunch Vancouver Waterfront
seo.description: Independent waterfront cafe with in-house roasting, brunch, and espresso bar. Open seven days.
